description_long: This object is a rectangular projector with a predominantly white body and a prominent black mounting bracket on top. The front face features a large, circular lens assembly that protrudes outward, surrounded by a subtle bezel. Both sides of the projector have horizontal slatted vents for cooling, with the left side showing a series of small circular indents, possibly for screws or additional ventilation. The rear is plain and unadorned, while the top is smooth except for the central black bracket, which suggests ceiling or overhead mounting. The overall design is utilitarian, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements, suitable for installation in public or commercial urban environments.
description: A white rectangular projector with a large front lens, side vents, and a black mounting bracket on top, designed for ceiling installation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large circular lens and the black mounting bracket on top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the horizontal vents and the protruding lens at the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, featureless back and the black mounting bracket.
description_view_3: Right side view with visible horizontal vents and a series of small circular indents.
attribute_lens_type: fixed, short-throw lens with a large circular glass element and no visible adjustment rings
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Horizontal slatted vents on both left and right sides, with additional small circular indents on the right side.
